reason: Authoritative audit-event / state / failure_category registry. PR2 adds exporter-events.jsonl audit path + three new event_types (ffmpeg_export_failed/succeeded/fallback_placeholder); must be codified here. Also documents canonical decision-field contract that the new helper output must satisfy.

Codifies CORE_DECISION_EVENT_TYPES + reason_code/failure_category strict enums. PR2 adds three new event_types to the registry. recorder log lines for stderr_log_path / decision must follow the established patterns; exporter audit lines should mirror them.

Forbidden patterns (no utils.py/helpers.py; encoding=utf-8 mandatory on durable JSONL; typed pydantic for cross-stage payloads). New ffmpeg_runner.py and ExporterAuditEvent must comply. Common Mistake entries on ffmpeg retry/stderr capture inform helper design.
Resilience-first conventions: continue past bad rows, append audit + log on anomalies, no silent fail. Exporter audit emission + helper failure handling must keep this discipline.
Confirms module placement; ffmpeg_runner.py belongs in src/arl/shared/ (next to failure_contracts.py / logging.py / jsonl_store.py).
